Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Bryde.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Vincent Gutierrez is present.
Attorney Teresa Friend representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Oct-29-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
